text.title: Data Analysis — Requirements Discovery and Quality Assessment Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the data-analysis methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Ask: how many SMB customers churned last quarter? → step 1 needs: customer.segment, churned_at, period filter → step 2 dictionary rows with source-of-truth → step 3 ER snap → step 4 quality flags churned_at completeness 0.78 → step 5 rules: completeness threshold 0.95 before metric usable. Output reconciles two earlier conflicting reports.
